summary: Backend API testing completed for CSV templates and bulk import features. 15/15 tests passed (100%). All 3 new features verified working: CSV Templates endpoint, Dining Menu Bulk Upload, and Clear Menu by Date.

csv_templates.details: Returns templates for 'users', 'dining_menu', and 'events'. Each template includes: name, description, filename, headers, example_rows, required_fields, optional_fields, and notes.

dining_menu_bulk_upload.details: Accepts CSV file upload. Validates required fields (name, meal_type, date). Validates meal_type values (Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner, Snacks). Parses pipe-separated dietary_tags. Returns success_count, failed_count, errors, and items_created.

clear_menu_by_date.details: Clears all menu items for specified date. Returns items_deleted count. Requires admin/super_admin role (not RA).

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ GET /api/admin/csv-templates correctly returns all 3 templates with proper structure
✓ POST /api/dining/menu/bulk-upload validates CSV format, required fields, and meal_type values
✓ DELETE /api/dining/menu/clear-date/{date} properly restricts to admin/super_admin roles
✓ All endpoints require authentication (401/403 without token)
✓ Bulk upload handles UTF-8 and latin-1 encoding gracefully
seed_data_creation: Test menu items created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: CSV templates and bulk import features fully tested. GET /api/admin/csv-templates returns templates for users, dining_menu, events. POST /api/dining/menu/bulk-upload accepts CSV with columns: name,description,meal_type,date,dietary_tags,nutrition_info. DELETE /api/dining/menu/clear-date/{date} clears all menu items for a date. All endpoints require admin authentication.
